message:
✨ Add stunning LLM-d visualizations with animated graphs and flow diagrams (#507)

New visualization cards for the AI/ML dashboard:
- LLMdFlow: Animated request flow diagram with particle effects showing
  the full inference pipeline (Gateway → EPP → Prefill/Decode → KVCache)
- KVCacheMonitor: Real-time cache level gauges with heat map view
- EPPRouting: Sankey-style diagram showing request distribution
- PDDisaggregation: Prefill/Decode split view with animated KV transfers
- LLMdBenchmarks: Performance charts comparing baseline vs llm-d
- LLMdAIInsights: Claude-powered analysis with recommendations
- LLMdConfigurator: Interactive preset configuration showcase

Features:
- Framer Motion animations throughout
- Glowing/pulsing effects for active components
- Real-time metrics updates with smooth transitions
- Dark theme optimized with neon accents
- Demo data with realistic patterns based on llm-d architecture

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

+  return pods.map(pod => {
